---
title: "DataAccess"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-07"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


## This is creating nfl_team_season

```{r}
library(nflreadr)
library(dplyr)

sched <- load_schedules(2005:2023)

home_reg <- sched %>%
  filter(game_type == "REG") %>%
  transmute(
    season,
    team = home_team,
    points_for = home_score,
    points_against = away_score,
    win = as.integer(home_score > away_score),
    loss = as.integer(home_score < away_score),
    tie = as.integer(home_score == away_score)
  )

away_reg <- sched %>%
  filter(game_type == "REG") %>%
  transmute(
    season,
    team = away_team,
    points_for = away_score,
    points_against = home_score,
    win = as.integer(away_score > home_score),
    loss = as.integer(away_score < home_score),
    tie = as.integer(away_score == home_score)
  )

reg_team_season <- bind_rows(home_reg, away_reg) %>%
  group_by(season, team) %>%
  summarise(
    wins = sum(win, na.rm = TRUE),
    losses = sum(loss, na.rm = TRUE),
    ties = sum(tie, na.rm = TRUE),
    games_played = n(),
    win_pct = (wins + 0.5 * ties) / games_played,
    .groups = "drop"
  )


post_types <- c("WC", "DIV", "CON", "SB")

home_post <- sched %>%
  filter(game_type %in% post_types) %>%
  transmute(
    season,
    team = home_team,
    game_type,
    playoff_game = 1L,
    playoff_win = as.integer(home_score > away_score),
    won_conference = as.integer(game_type == "CON" & home_score > away_score),
    super_bowl_appearance = as.integer(game_type == "SB"),
    super_bowl_win = as.integer(game_type == "SB" & home_score > away_score)
  )

away_post <- sched %>%
  filter(game_type %in% post_types) %>%
  transmute(
    season,
    team = away_team,
    game_type,
    playoff_game = 1L,
    playoff_win = as.integer(away_score > home_score),
    won_conference = as.integer(game_type == "CON" & away_score > home_score),
    super_bowl_appearance = as.integer(game_type == "SB"),
    super_bowl_win = as.integer(game_type == "SB" & away_score > home_score)
  )

post_team_season <- bind_rows(home_post, away_post) %>%
  group_by(season, team) %>%
  summarise(
    made_playoffs = as.integer(sum(playoff_game, na.rm = TRUE) > 0),
    playoff_wins = sum(playoff_win, na.rm = TRUE),
    won_conference = as.integer(sum(won_conference, na.rm = TRUE) > 0),
    super_bowl_appearance = as.integer(sum(super_bowl_appearance, na.rm = TRUE) > 0),
    super_bowl_win = as.integer(sum(super_bowl_win, na.rm = TRUE) > 0),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# -----------------------------
# Final team-season dataset
# -----------------------------
nfl_team_season <- reg_team_season %>%
  left_join(post_team_season, by = c("season", "team")) %>%
  mutate(
    made_playoffs = if_else(is.na(made_playoffs), 0L, made_playoffs),
    playoff_wins = if_else(is.na(playoff_wins), 0L, playoff_wins),
    won_conference = if_else(is.na(won_conference), 0L, won_conference),
    super_bowl_appearance = if_else(is.na(super_bowl_appearance), 0L, super_bowl_appearance),
    super_bowl_win = if_else(is.na(super_bowl_win), 0L, super_bowl_win)
  ) %>%
  arrange(season, team)

write.csv(nfl_team_season, "nfl_team_season.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

## Now we must create team_metro_crosswalk
```{r}
library(dplyr)

team_metro_crosswalk <- nfl_team_season %>%
  select(team, season) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(
    metro_id = case_when(
      team == "ARI" ~ "PHX",
      team == "ATL" ~ "ATL",
      team == "BAL" ~ "BAL",
      team == "BUF" ~ "BUF",
      team == "CAR" ~ "CLT",
      team == "CHI" ~ "CHI",
      team == "CIN" ~ "CIN",
      team == "CLE" ~ "CLE",
      team == "DAL" ~ "DAL",
      team == "DEN" ~ "DEN",
      team == "DET" ~ "DET",
      team == "GB"  ~ "GB",
      team == "HOU" ~ "HOU",
      team == "IND" ~ "IND",
      team == "JAX" ~ "JAX",
      team == "KC"  ~ "KC",
      team == "MIA" ~ "MIA",
      team == "MIN" ~ "MIN",
      team == "NE"  ~ "BOS",
      team == "NO"  ~ "NO",
      team == "NYG" ~ "NYC",
      team == "NYJ" ~ "NYC",
      team == "OAK" ~ "SF",
      team == "LV"  ~ "LV",
      team == "PHI" ~ "PHL",
      team == "PIT" ~ "PIT",
      team == "SD"  ~ "SD",
      team == "LAC" ~ "LAX",
      team == "SEA" ~ "SEA",
      team == "SF"  ~ "SF",
      team == "STL" ~ "STL",
      team == "LAR" ~ "LAX",
      team == "LA" ~ "LAX",
      team == "TB"  ~ "TB",
      team == "TEN" ~ "NSH",
      team == "WAS" ~ "WAS",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    metro_name = case_when(
      metro_id == "PHX" ~ "Phoenix Metro",
      metro_id == "ATL" ~ "Atlanta Metro",
      metro_id == "BAL" ~ "Baltimore Metro",
      metro_id == "BUF" ~ "Buffalo Metro",
      metro_id == "CLT" ~ "Charlotte Metro",
      metro_id == "CHI" ~ "Chicago Metro",
      metro_id == "CIN" ~ "Cincinnati Metro",
      metro_id == "CLE" ~ "Cleveland Metro",
      metro_id == "DAL" ~ "Dallas Metro",
      metro_id == "DEN" ~ "Denver Metro",
      metro_id == "DET" ~ "Detroit Metro",
      metro_id == "GB"  ~ "Green Bay Metro",
      metro_id == "HOU" ~ "Houston Metro",
      metro_id == "IND" ~ "Indianapolis Metro",
      metro_id == "JAX" ~ "Jacksonville Metro",
      metro_id == "KC"  ~ "Kansas City Metro",
      metro_id == "MIA" ~ "Miami Metro",
      metro_id == "MIN" ~ "Minneapolis Metro",
      metro_id == "BOS" ~ "Boston Metro",
      metro_id == "NO"  ~ "New Orleans Metro",
      metro_id == "NYC" ~ "New York Metro",
      metro_id == "SF"  ~ "San Francisco-Oakland Metro",
      metro_id == "LV"  ~ "Las Vegas Metro",
      metro_id == "PHL" ~ "Philadelphia Metro",
      metro_id == "PIT" ~ "Pittsburgh Metro",
      metro_id == "SD"  ~ "San Diego Metro",
      metro_id == "LAX" ~ "Los Angeles Metro",
      metro_id == "SEA" ~ "Seattle Metro",
      metro_id == "STL" ~ "St. Louis Metro",
      metro_id == "TB"  ~ "Tampa Metro",
      metro_id == "NSH" ~ "Nashville Metro",
      metro_id == "WAS" ~ "Washington Metro",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

write.csv(team_metro_crosswalk, "nfl_team_metro_crosswalk.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
nfl_team_with_metro <- nfl_team_season %>%
  left_join(team_metro_crosswalk, by = c("team", "season"))
```


## Build NFL Metro Season
```{r}
library(dplyr)

nfl_metro_season <- nfl_team_with_metro %>%
  group_by(metro_id, metro_name, season) %>%
  summarise(
    num_teams = n(),
    total_wins = sum(wins, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_losses = sum(losses, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_ties = sum(ties, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_win_pct = mean(win_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_win_pct = max(win_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    any_playoff_team = as.integer(max(made_playoffs, na.rm = TRUE) > 0),
    total_playoff_wins = sum(playoff_wins, na.rm = TRUE),
    any_conference_champ = as.integer(max(won_conference, na.rm = TRUE) > 0),
    any_super_bowl_appearance = as.integer(max(super_bowl_appearance, na.rm = TRUE) > 0),
    any_super_bowl_win = as.integer(max(super_bowl_win, na.rm = TRUE) > 0),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(season, metro_id)

write.csv(nfl_metro_season, "../RawData/nfl_metro_season.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```


## Final Dataset
It is time to make the final dataset. This will merge all of the datasets together, and it should look like this
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

read_bea_county_file <- function(file_path) {
  raw_lines <- readLines(file_path, warn = FALSE)

  header_idx <- which(
    str_detect(raw_lines, "^GeoFIPS,GeoName,") |
      str_detect(raw_lines, "^GeoFIPS,GeoName$") |
      str_detect(raw_lines, "^GeoFIPS,GeoName,\\d{4}")
  )[1]

  if (is.na(header_idx)) {
    stop(paste("Could not find a GeoFIPS/GeoName header in:", file_path))
  }

  df <- read_csv(
    file_path,
    skip = header_idx - 1,
    show_col_types = FALSE
  )

  names(df)[1:2] <- c("GeoFIPS", "GeoName")

  df
}

make_bea_long <- function(df, value_name) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      GeoFIPS = str_pad(as.character(GeoFIPS), width = 5, side = "left", pad = "0")
    ) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = -c(GeoFIPS, GeoName),
      names_to = "year",
      values_to = value_name
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      year = readr::parse_number(year),
      across(all_of(value_name), as.numeric)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      county_fips = GeoFIPS,
      county_geoname = GeoName
    )
}

inc_0106 <- read_bea_county_file("../RawData/PersonalIncome2001to2006.csv")
inc_0715 <- read_bea_county_file("../RawData/PersonalIncome2007to2015.csv")
inc_1624 <- read_bea_county_file("../RawData/PersonalIncome2016to2024.csv")


income_all <- bind_rows(
  make_bea_long(inc_0106, "personal_income_pc"),
  make_bea_long(inc_0715, "personal_income_pc"),
  make_bea_long(inc_1624, "personal_income_pc")
)


# read the GDP files
gdp_0106 <- read_bea_county_file("../RawData/GDP2001to2006.csv")
gdp_0715 <- read_bea_county_file("../RawData/GDP2007to2015.csv")
gdp_1624 <- read_bea_county_file("../RawData/GDP2016to2024.csv")

gdp_all <- bind_rows(
  make_bea_long(gdp_0106, "gdp"),
  make_bea_long(gdp_0715, "gdp"),
  make_bea_long(gdp_1624, "gdp")
)

metro_county_crosswalk <- read_csv(
  "../RawData/metro_county_crosswalk_compact.csv",
  col_types = cols(
    metro_id = col_character(),
    metro_name = col_character(),
    county_fips = col_character(),
    county_name = col_character(),
    state_abbr = col_character(),
    assignment_order = col_double(),
    selection_style = col_character()
  ),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    county_fips = str_pad(county_fips, width = 5, side = "left", pad = "0")
  )

nfl_metro_season <- read_csv(
  "../RawData/nfl_metro_season.csv",
  col_types = cols(
    metro_id = col_character(),
    metro_name = col_character(),
    season = col_integer(),
    num_teams = col_integer(),
    total_wins = col_double(),
    total_losses = col_double(),
    total_ties = col_double(),
    avg_win_pct = col_double(),
    max_win_pct = col_double(),
    any_playoff_team = col_integer(),
    total_playoff_wins = col_double(),
    any_conference_champ = col_integer(),
    any_super_bowl_appearance = col_integer(),
    any_super_bowl_win = col_integer()
  ),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

nfl_team_metro_crosswalk <- read_csv("../RawData/nfl_team_metro_crosswalk.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
nfl_team_season <- read_csv("../RawData/nfl_team_season.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

#county GDP to metro year
metro_gdp <- gdp_all %>%
  inner_join(metro_county_crosswalk, by = "county_fips") %>%
  group_by(metro_id, metro_name, year) %>%
  summarise(
    metro_gdp = sum(gdp, na.rm = TRUE),
    gdp_counties_used = n_distinct(county_fips),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Aggregate county personal income to metro-year
# Since this appears to be per-capita personal income, use the average across included counties.
metro_income <- income_all %>%
  inner_join(metro_county_crosswalk, by = "county_fips") %>%
  group_by(metro_id, metro_name, year) %>%
  summarise(
    metro_personal_income_pc = mean(personal_income_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
    income_counties_used = n_distinct(county_fips),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

#merging econ indicators 
metro_econ_year <- metro_gdp %>%
  full_join(metro_income, by = c("metro_id", "metro_name", "year"))

# shifting econ year
metro_econ_next_year <- metro_econ_year %>%
  mutate(
    season = year - 1,
    econ_year = year
  )

final_merged_panel <- nfl_metro_season %>%
  left_join(
    metro_econ_next_year,
    by = c("metro_id", "metro_name", "season")
  ) %>%
  select(-year) %>%
  arrange(season, metro_id)


# output
write_csv(final_merged_panel, "final_merged_panel.csv")
```
